description.de: Creator-Royalty in Basispunkten (0–10000). Z.B. 500 = 5%, 1000 = 10%. 0 für keine Royalties.

output.EGLD_PRICE_FORMATTED: transform:() => parseFloat(results.EGLD_PRICE || 0).toLocaleString('en-US', { style: 'currency', currency: 'USD', minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })
output.MARKET_CAP_FORMATTED: transform:() => { const cap = parseFloat(results.MARKET_CAP || 0); return cap >= 1e9 ? `$${(cap / 1e9).toFixed(2)}B` : cap >= 1e6 ? `$${(cap / 1e6).toFixed(2)}M` : `$${cap.toLocaleString('en-US')}`; }
output.STAKED_FORMATTED: transform:() => { const staked = parseFloat(results.STAKED || 0); return staked >= 1e6 ? `${(staked / 1e6).toFixed(2)}M EGLD` : `${staked.toLocaleString('en-US')} EGLD`; }

inputs.name: User Address

description.en: Stake eGold using Xoxno liquid staking to earn rewards. Receive liquid staking tokens that represent your staked position and can be used in DeFi protocols while earning staking rewards.
description.de: Stake eGold mit Xoxno Liquid Staking, um Belohnungen zu verdienen. Erhalte Liquid Staking-Token, die deine gestakte Position repräsentieren und in DeFi-Protokollen verwendet werden können, während du Staking-Belohnungen verdienst.
